column1: States ranked by enacted-mandate strength (most → least) for outreach prioritization.
Score: mandatory enacted = 2 · qualified enacted (permissive/penalty/public/mapping/local/reporting/~) = 1 · pending/dead/vetoed/none = 0. Equal weight across the 5 industries. Max = 10.

Per-cell points: green=2 (mandatory enacted), yellow=1 (qualified enacted), blank=0. Tiers: T1 ≥7 · T2 4-6 · T3 1-3 · T4 0. Use as the outreach priority order; combine with ACV/footprint signals when sequencing reps.
